title: Inclusive Game Design and Development
creator: IGDA and Facebook Gaming
description: A research report and practical resource about inclusive teams, player communities, representation, research, and development decisions. It treats inclusion as a process spanning people, content, and production.
useful: It broadens inclusive design beyond feature compliance to the composition and working habits of the teams making games.
audience: Leads, producers, researchers, educators, and developers planning more inclusive teams and projects.
learning: Connect team practices with design outcomes
Plan research with a wider range of players
